reviews.review_text: Neat & tidy "leisure home".. across road from Bowling Club & close to shops.

Easy access. All sites close to amenities which were older but clean. Pet friendly. Good camp kitchen. Best part was how close to the shops it was. Did not even unhook the car. BONUS $10 voucher to use across at the Lakes Bowls Club which we did use. Not sure if it is a winter bonus but very happy with it. Will return.

Second time staying here and once again it was lovely gardens were wonderful parking was lovely toilets were very very clean a credit to the staff
Only downside which has nothing to do with the park was our neighbours who were constantly smoking
Thanks for a wonderful stay
Glenn and Carole
Very nicely maintained park, great location opposite the Bowling club.
Great park. Nice and quiet for us oldies.
Unfriendly, dirty toilets and expensive!

Good caravan park, right in the middle of town. Karen and her team keep the park very tidy. Camp kitchen, fish cleaning station, neat & tidy toilet block and grass sites.
Highly recommended.

Small park but beautifully kept.
Very clean and tidy.
Great location and dog friendly.
Walking distance to everything you need.
Owned by bowling club which is directly opposite the park.
Good park with easy to access sites. Great camp kitchen. Toilets and showers could do with a refresh. Good location with easy access to clubs and shopping.

A great location with friendly and accomodating, approachable and friendly staff. The Amenities and sites are clean and enjoyable. The Location its perfect literally 1 block from the esplanade, water and shops including Woolworths. Would highly recommend this Park and would go back to visit the town lots to do.

Sites to small..no room to park car..showers way to small no room shower head not hi enough..bathroom   sinks way back retro style..camp kitchen ok..but no microwave in kitchen  or BBQ  area.??..lady at little office when booked in wasn't  very polite..left a day earlier  wasn't  happy..definitely  will not stay if down that way again
Very clean and tidy.nice stay.

Very nice park
Great location
Amenities really really good

Woodbine Tourist Park, Lakes Entrance, Victoria is very disappointing. We just watched 3 caravans/RVs drive away because the office closes at 5pm. It has 43 sites which are so close together you have to park your car on the roadway. There are no facilities for children with nowhere for them to play. This is definitely a one night stay if desperate and NOT a Family Park.

Caravan stay- nice clean grassed flat ground some site small some drive through. Camp kitchen clean plenty cooking facilities TV Free WiFi. Pet friendly. No kids play area or swimming pool. Next to lakes entrance bowling club and across road is Woolworths. One amenities block which is dated but clean Showers a bit small for larger people. Easy check in Manager needs to lighten up a bit certainly made you feel like you were an inconvenience being there
Small and hard to park medium sized van, 21' with American Truck, owner not very accommodating, so we stayed next door at the Council park for our extra time!

Very clean amenities and a wonderful camp kitchen.
Close to clubs, shopping and beach.
Nice, little and clean caravan park!
We have stayed in many caravan parks part of Discovery parks/G’Day but this has been the one we have liked the least. We were met by a rude woman on phone and then felt unwelcome at the park.

Great little rv park. With all facilities and dump point. Reasonably priced and very tidy.
A credit to the management.
Really well maintained park. Very handy for the bowls club.
Very small park but clean and has all the necessary facilities. No entertainment for kids but has a bath.  Close walk to the lake, shops and restaurants.

This is a small  beautifully maintained park.  Amenities are spotless . Camp kitchen , one of the best we've seen . Grass sites are perfection. It's walking distance to the wharf , Woolies and BWS and pretty much everything, so great if you're in a Motor home. We will return if we can. Thank you to Karen ,who couldn't be nicer or more helpful.
Lovely park close to town
Awesome town. Loved the Island we could walk to. Great fish and chips. Great caravan park. Awesome camp kitchen. Amenities were spotless. Helpful receptionist.
Nice park with clean amenities.. well looked after and will stay again..
No shade, good size flat sites. Kitchen facilities good, amenities good...office lady a little brusque though.
We stayed in the 3 bdrm house. Very clean, reasonable pricing. Easy parking for 3 cars. Lovely staff at reception.  Loved how they kept the house in the 50's

It's a small campground with a really well maintained camp kitchen. The kitchen and BBQ area looks pretty new with aircon and undercover seating/tables. The amenities are a bit old but clean and functional. Nothing for kids, but an easy walk to a great playground on the waterfront.
Stayed 2 days in Woodbine house, Very difficult to mix hot & cold water in shower taps. Small shower area.

Always feel welcome
Quiet peaceful and close to CBD
Facilities were clean. Convenient location. Staff was very kind and friendly!
Good place to stay not a large park thu has drive thu sites that are grass and concrete pads toilets old but very clean all shops and clubs are in walking distance
Nice park
Managers won't even allow a small mat to stop the dirt n mowed grass from getting into your van .size of a small door mat . Not very user friendly
Nice place well run, place is immaculate. Hasn't changed and is opposite The L.E. bowling club
Clean environment and the cabin.  Friendly and helpful staff. 👌
Friendly staff great park to stay
Excellent quality throughout. Nicely kept property. Missing a hair dryer an oversight I would think. Phil
Lovely small park, close to everything, well keep, beautifully clean, would stay here again!
Have spent time in both cabins and caravan . The outdoor kitchen/BBQ is amazing. So close to bowling club.
great camp kitchen with lovely staff. small caravan park but we’ll maintained. there were no gates closing the park to road entrance but would recommend.

We stayed here for 2 nights and it was probably on of the most congested site I had experienced. You definitely need a very good signal/directional person to guide you into the caravan parking lot. Amenities were clean and well taken care of. Walking distance to supermarket and nearby shops. Wifi signal is not the best. Having a personal data plan will be much reliable.
